completed_tasks.name: Deployment config & cleanup
completed_tasks.progress: Tasks 1-2 done (CORS/Docker update, old apps deleted). Task 3 (verification checkpoint) paused — deploying to Railway.

blockers.description: ops-dashboard Railway build fails with 'secret AUTH_JWT_SECRET: not found' — Railpack secret detection issue
blockers.workaround: Set AUTH_JWT_SECRET=temp in build command prefix: AUTH_JWT_SECRET=temp npm install && AUTH_JWT_SECRET=temp npm run build --workspace=apps/ops-dashboard

blockers.description: Login returns 'Invalid credentials' despite seed running — bcrypt hash was corrupted by shell $-interpolation during Railway seed. Hash manually updated via SQL but login still failing with no error (silent redirect loop)
blockers.workaround: Need to verify: 1) ops-api start command is 'npm run start --workspace=apps/ops-api', 2) AUTH_JWT_SECRET matches between ops-api and ops-dashboard, 3) middleware can verify JWT tokens

human_actions_pending.action: Fix Railway ops-dashboard build (AUTH_JWT_SECRET secret detection)
human_actions_pending.context: Railpack treats env vars as Docker secrets

human_actions_pending.action: Fix login flow — verify AUTH_JWT_SECRET matches across services
human_actions_pending.context: Token signs on ops-api, verifies on ops-dashboard middleware

human_actions_pending.action: Change ops-api start command back to 'npm run start --workspace=apps/ops-api' (remove seed prefix)
human_actions_pending.context: Seed was temporarily added to start command

human_actions_pending.action: Seed remaining users (Nick D, Mike F, Payroll User) if needed

decisions.decision: Consolidated 5 dashboard apps into 1 unified ops-dashboard
decisions.rationale: Reduces Railway services from 5 to 1, simplifies deployment

decisions.decision: ops-dashboard runs on port 3011 (auth-portal's old port)
decisions.rationale: Minimal URL change for existing users

next_action: Fix Railway deployment: 1) Resolve AUTH_JWT_SECRET build secret issue, 2) Ensure ops-api start command is correct, 3) Verify AUTH_JWT_SECRET matches between services, 4) Test login flow end-to-end
context_notes: All 8 plans executed and code committed. Plans 19-01 through 19-07 fully complete with SUMMARYs. Plan 19-08 has 2/3 tasks committed — stuck on Task 3 (verification checkpoint) due to Railway deployment issues. The code itself is complete — the blocker is purely deployment configuration. The 'no error' login behavior suggests the middleware JWT verification is failing silently (mismatched AUTH_JWT_SECRET between ops-api and ops-dashboard, or the secret not being available at runtime).
